technical_replicate: Each experiment was performed in biological triplicates and technical duplicates.
experimental_design: To study the impact of Rpd3, Mi-2, and MEP-1 on TE repression, we knocked them down (KD) by RNA interference (RNAi)
factor_value: Rpd3, Mi-2, and MEP-1 mediate TE transcriptional repression
number_of_fractions: Very similar elution peaks (fractions 20–22) were observed for Mi-2 and MEP-1
